message:
chore(gitignore): exclude Go test coverage profile artifacts

Go test runs with -coverprofile produce *.cover files that are
transient build artifacts and should not be committed. This prevents
accidental inclusion of coverage data from local test runs.

- Add *.cover glob to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,3 +67,6 @@ test_screenshot.png
 
 # E2E runtime lockfiles
 e2e/*.lock
+
+# Go test coverage profiles
+*.cover
